element.ToolTip: Defines the type test, user is configuring. If it just a back to back test, select port to port option.
element.Caption: Test Type

element.ToolTip: Defines the role this port group is going to play: If initiator, then p2p/p2d responder only for p2p cases.
element.Caption: Role

element.ToolTip: Defines the version of ip address style to be used for describing the range.
element.Caption: Emulated Subnet Ip Type

element.ToolTip: Defines the base address to be used for enumerating all the emulated subnets in the range
element.Caption: Emulated Subnet

element.ToolTip: Defines the length (in bits) of the mask to be used in conjunction with all the addresses created in the range. e.g., a prefix of 24 = 255.255.255.0 for ipv4
element.Caption: Emulated Subnet Prefix

element.ToolTip: Defines the increment to be used for enumerating all the emulated subnets in the range.
element.Caption: ESN Increment By

element.ToolTip: Defines the base address to be used for enumerating all the protected subnets in the range
element.Caption: Protected Subnet

element.ToolTip: Defines the length (in bits) of the mask to be used in conjunction with all the addresses created in the range. e.g., a prefix of 24 = 255.255.255.0 for ipv4
element.Caption: Protected Subnet Prefix

element.ToolTip: Defines the version of ip address style to be used for describing the range.
element.Caption: Public Peer IP Type

element.ToolTip: Public IP address of the peer.
element.Caption: Public Peer IP

element.ToolTip: Single protected host on responder side.
element.Caption: Single Protected Host
